attributes.description: Deep-dive into performance for any game: FPS trends across sessions, frametime distribution, stutter analysis, and bottleneck identification. Use the filters above to compare specific driver or Proton versions.

query.esql: FROM metrics-gamepulse.session-default | WHERE gamepulse.summary.ended == true | STATS `Sessions` = COUNT(*)
FROM metrics-gamepulse.session-default | WHERE gamepulse.summary.ended == true | STATS `Sessions` = COUNT(*)
FROM metrics-gamepulse.session-default | WHERE gamepulse.summary.ended == true AND gamepulse.summary.avg_fps IS NOT NULL | STATS `Avg FPS` = ROUND(AVG(gamepulse.summary.avg_fps), 0)
FROM metrics-gamepulse.session-default | WHERE gamepulse.summary.ended == true AND gamepulse.summary.avg_fps IS NOT NULL | STATS `Avg FPS` = ROUND(AVG(gamepulse.summary.avg_fps), 0)
FROM metrics-gamepulse.session-default | WHERE gamepulse.summary.ended == true AND gamepulse.summary.low_1pct_fps IS NOT NULL | STATS `1pct Low` = ROUND(AVG(gamepulse.summary.low_1pct_fps), 0)
FROM metrics-gamepulse.session-default | WHERE gamepulse.summary.ended == true AND gamepulse.summary.low_1pct_fps IS NOT NULL | STATS `1pct Low` = ROUND(AVG(gamepulse.summary.low_1pct_fps), 0)
FROM metrics-gamepulse.session-default | WHERE gamepulse.summary.ended == true AND gamepulse.summary.p99_frametime_ms IS NOT NULL | STATS `p99 ms` = ROUND(AVG(gamepulse.summary.p99_frametime_ms), 1)
FROM metrics-gamepulse.session-default | WHERE gamepulse.summary.ended == true AND gamepulse.summary.p99_frametime_ms IS NOT NULL | STATS `p99 ms` = ROUND(AVG(gamepulse.summary.p99_frametime_ms), 1)
FROM metrics-gamepulse.session-default | WHERE gamepulse.summary.ended == true | STATS `Stutters` = SUM(gamepulse.summary.stutter_count)
FROM metrics-gamepulse.session-default | WHERE gamepulse.summary.ended == true | STATS `Stutters` = SUM(gamepulse.summary.stutter_count)
FROM metrics-gamepulse.session-default | WHERE gamepulse.summary.ended == true | STATS `Hours` = ROUND(SUM(gamepulse.summary.duration_s) / 3600.0, 1)
FROM metrics-gamepulse.session-default | WHERE gamepulse.summary.ended == true | STATS `Hours` = ROUND(SUM(gamepulse.summary.duration_s) / 3600.0, 1)

embeddableConfig.title: FPS Over Time — Each colour = one gaming session. Natural time gaps between sessions preserve chronological context. Compare sessions across driver/Proton versions using the filters above.
Frame Time Over Time — spikes reveal stutter events. Target: avg frametime ≤ 33 ms for 30 FPS cap, ≤ 16.7 ms for 60 FPS. 0.1% lows (worst frames) amplify hitches invisible in the average.
Stutter Events Per Interval — sudden spikes indicate shader compilation hitches, CPU-GPU sync issues, or memory pressure. stutter_detected fires when frametime exceeds 2× the rolling average.
Dominant Bottleneck by Session — where was the system limited? GPU-bound means GPU is the constraint; CPU-bound means CPU-side overhead.
GPU Utilisation % Over Time — values consistently below 95% suggest CPU bottleneck or thermal throttling; values at 99–100% indicate GPU-bound.
CPU Utilisation % Over Time — high CPU load combined with low GPU load confirms CPU-bound workload.
Per-Session Performance Summary — complete stats for every session in the selected period

attributes.title: GamePulse — Game Performance
